metadata.source_title: Choose your own route to demonstrable cyber security

text: ABN AMRO Editorial. The new European Cybersecurity Act (NIS2) obliges thousands of organizations to demonstrably improve their digital resilience. But what exactly does that mean in practice? Do you need ISO 27001 as an organization? Or is the NIS2 Quality Mark sufficient?

metadata.source_title: Choose your own route to demonstrable cyber security

text: The new European Cybersecurity Act (NIS2) obliges thousands of organizations to demonstrably improve their digital resilience. But what exactly does that mean in practice? Do you need ISO 27001 as an organization? Or is the NIS2 Quality Mark sufficient? The reality is simpler than many people think: ultimately, only the supervisor determines whether your organization complies with the law.

metadata.source_title: Choose your own route to demonstrable cyber security

text: But what exactly does that mean in practice? Do you need ISO 27001 as an organization? Or is the NIS2 Quality Mark sufficient? The reality is simpler than many people think: ultimately, only the supervisor determines whether your organization complies with the law. Freedom in the method of demonstration.

metadata.source_title: Choose your own route to demonstrable cyber security

text: Do you need ISO 27001 as an organization? Or is the NIS2 Quality Mark sufficient? The reality is simpler than many people think: ultimately, only the supervisor determines whether your organization complies with the law. Freedom in the method of demonstration. The NIS2 legislation does not prescribe which standard you must follow.

metadata.source_title: Choose your own route to demonstrable cyber security

text: Or is the NIS2 Quality Mark sufficient? The reality is simpler than many people think: ultimately, only the supervisor determines whether your organization complies with the law. Freedom in the method of demonstration. The NIS2 legislation does not prescribe which standard you must follow. However, you must demonstrate that your security measures comply with Article 21.

metadata.source_title: Choose your own route to demonstrable cyber security

text: The reality is simpler than many people think: ultimately, only the supervisor determines whether your organization complies with the law. Freedom in the method of demonstration. The NIS2 legislation does not prescribe which standard you must follow. However, you must demonstrate that your security measures comply with Article 21. This gives organizations room to choose their own route, as long as the measures are effective and fit their business operations.

metadata.source_title: Choose your own route to demonstrable cyber security

Certification is not mandatory, but offers advantages.

metadata.source_title: Choose your own route to demonstrable cyber security

text: However, you must demonstrate that your security measures comply with Article 21. This gives organizations room to choose their own route, as long as the measures are effective and fit their business operations. Why a recognized standard is sensible. Certification is not mandatory, but offers advantages. Standards such as ISO 27001 or the NIS2 Quality Mark provide structure and confidence.

They make it easier to convince customers, partners and regulators of your digital resilience.

Auditors and supervisors understand the design and terminology, which prevents discussions about interpretation.
